sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁטּים

Transliteration: shiṭṭı̂ym

Phonetic: shit-teem'

BDB Definition:

Shittim = "the acacias"
  1. place of Israel's encampment between the conquest of the transjordanic region and crossing the Jordan into Canaan
  2. a place west of Jerusalem

Origin: the same as the pl. of H7848

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
